case_title: VICTORIA COPELND ET AL VS. AIRBNB, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF COPELAND, VICTORIA
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -DARIEN SHEPHERD TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF AIRBNB, INC FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COPELAND, VICTORIA SANCHEZ, MARCOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COPELAND, VICTORIA SANCHEZ, MARCOS AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF VICTORIA COPELAND IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF MARCOS SANCHEZ IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY VICTORIA COPELAND, WIFE. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY DARIEN SHEPERD, LEGAL INVESTIGATOR SUPERVISOR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
